description: The requirement-level spec defines mixed-currency aggregation only when the USD/JPY rate is available, but it never specifies the user-visible behavior when USD positions exist and that FX rate is missing. Downstream artifacts already introduce a pending-rate state for that case, so AC-007-3 currently has no stable requirement-level oracle for a core failure path.

evidence.snippet: When: The current USD/JPY rate is available / Then: Aggregate totals are normalized to JPY and an exchange-rate note is shown
